markdown:
#  What are the default submittal statuses in Procore? 
##  Answer 
In the project's Submittals tool, the default statuses that are available for assignment on a submittal include:
  * **Open**. The submittal is waiting for a response for the approvers on the Submittal Workflow. This is the system's default status setting for a new submittal.
  * **Draft**. The submittal has been created, but is NOT yet submitted for its Approval Workflow. Submittal workflow due dates do not automatically advance while a submittal is in the 'Draft' status. See [What is a 'Draft' Submittal?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-draft-submittal)
  * **Closed**. The submittal has been closed. Your company can also create custom statuses for the project's Submittals tool. See [Create a Custom Submittal Log Status](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/create-custom-submittal-log-statuses).


## See Also
  * [What is a 'Draft' submittal?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-draft-submittal)
  * [What is the Procore Analytics Risk Report?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-procore-analytics-risk-report)
  * [What is the difference between a distribution group and distribution list in Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-a-distribution-group-and-a-distribution-list)


**Submittal Workflow**. The people assigned to complete the [submittal workflow](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms). In Procore, the submittal workflow includes two roles: a [submitter](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) and the approvers who are responsible for performing/completing the [approval process](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms). Typically, approvers are members of the design team.
In Procore, an _Approval Workflow_ designates the list of individuals who respond to submittals (for example, approve, reject, and so on.) in accordance with the rules that have been determined by the approval framework and approval process being used.
title: What are the default submittal statuses in Procore?
